THE COURT MADE A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE THAT SHE WORKED WITH DEFENDANT/CROSS-CLAIMANT U.S. FIRE'S COUNSEL, AMY ROSE, ON A MENTORSHIP PROGRAM FROM THE BAR. THERE WERE NO OBJECTIONS TO HAVING JUDGE MILLER HEAR THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. IF PARTIES AGREE TO A LIST OF TWO OR THREE JUDGES, A LETTER MUST BE SUBMITTED TO DEPT. 206 BY 4:30 PM ON 6/13/11. IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL SINGLY ASSIGN A JUDGE FOR ALL PURPOSES AND NOTICE WILL BE MAILED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT U.S. FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED IN PART, AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO THE 1ST THROUGH 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE EXISTENCE OF AN ACTUAL CONTROVERSY IS PROPERLY PLED BY PLAINTIFFS. A RESOLUTION OVER POLICY TERMS IS CRUCIAL TO BOTH PARTIES AS IT DIRECTLY IMPLICATES WHEN EXHAUSTION WILL OCCUR AND WHEN U.S. FIRE WILL BE, IF AT ALL, OBLIGATED TO ASSUME INDEMNITY/DEFENSE OF TEAM. FIFTH, SEVENTH & NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION AS TO GREAT AMERICAN SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. SIXTH, EIGHTH, & TENTH CAUSES OF ACTION AS TO NATIONAL SURETY SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NATIONAL SURETY MAY BRING A MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 464.(PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH CSR #11604
